programme.title: Ravi & Anoushka Shankar - Bangalore
programme.desc: Taking place in Bangalore, Ravi Shankar's gave this performance just a few months prior to his death.

programme.title: New Orleans Live - Dumpstaphunk
programme.desc: High-energy New Orleans funk band known for their infectious grooves, deep rhythms, and powerful performances

programme.title: Lavelle - Live
programme.desc: Recorded in 1982, Lavelle here showcases a true vocal mastery in both gospel and jazz repertoire.

programme.desc: Enjoy our chillin' playlist cooked with love and get your day off to a good start with Qwest TV!

NiconÃ© | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w NiconÃ©, recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Marc Romboy | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Systematic Recordings head honcho Marc Romboy is the protagonist of the next Ritter Butzke Club excursion filmed at the Aquarium Berlin.

programme.title: Bebetta | Ritter Butzke | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Bebetta from Berlins Museum für Kommunikation.

programme.title: Away To: Mir Amin with Nicole Moudaber - By Late Knights & Creative State | Lebanon
programme.desc: Queen of Techno and Lebanon's very own graces the Mir Amin Palace for our Halloween Special, firing up the yellow and red dancefloor.

programme.title: Natasha Wax, Sony Vibe | Aglomerat Club | Moscow (Russia)
programme.desc: We'd love to show you our Dj Set from Atlantis Party in Aglomerat Club, Moscow! Enjoy your listening!

programme.title: Claptone | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Claptone playing on Mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Philipp Straub | Soho Beach DXB | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: We have very much enjoyed the set of Phillip Straub at Soho Beach DXB right before Carl Cox!

programme.title: Tonio Barrientos | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w Tonio Barrientos, recorded at Pacha Munich and in support of the iconic club currently closed due to the Covid Pandemic.

programme.title: Yuko Kakizawa | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Experience the captivating sounds of Yuko Kakizawa at Wonderland 2024 in Paris, France.

programme.title: Francis Mercier B2B Arodes | We Belong Here | Miami (USA)
programme.desc: Francis Mercier B2B Arodes at We Belong Here in Miami, USA.

programme.title: Away To: Anya with Patch x Papa Soul - By Late Knights & Creative State | Faqra (Lebanon)
programme.desc: The dynamic duo of House bring on the funk to the mountaintops.

programme.title: Christian Smith | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a techno voyage with the maestro Christian Smith at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Carl Cox | Loveland Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Carl Cox delivered an outrageous set at Loveland Festival. His talent coupled with the amazing Loveland production with compelling light show which fuse together flawlessly to create the perfect musical feeling. Get ready for an hour of top-notch tech house and techno tunes!

programme.title: Away To: The Warehouse with Stephan Jolk - By Late Knights & Creative State | Lebanon
programme.desc: Stephan Jolk lights up The Warehouse with his absorbing sounds.

programme.title: Carl Cox | Time Warp | Mannheim (Germany)
programme.desc: Oh yes Oh yes! The King of Clubs delivers a massive set yet again, this time to those party pilgrims from all over Europe who've made the journey to the Mecca of electronic music that is Time Warp in Mannheim Germany.

programme.title: Mathias Kaden | SonneMondSterne | Saalburg (Germany)
programme.desc: SMS Boat party with Mathias Kaden

programme.title: Steve Aoki | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Get ready to party with the one and only Steve Aoki at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania!

programme.title: Francis Mercier | Elrow Festival | New York (USA)
programme.desc: Haitian DJ producer Francis Mercier (Deep Root, Insomniac, Spinninâ€™) presents a special set Live From The Brooklyn Mirage, at Elrow Summer Festival Far Rowest on July 2022.

programme.title: Marwan Dua | Untold Festival x Daydreaming stage 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Marwan Dua playing magical vibes on Daydreaming stage at Untold Festival 2022.

programme.title: Majes | Impact Techno Winter Rave 2023 | Le Mans (France)
programme.desc: Get ready for an electrifying journey with Majes at Impact Techno Winter Rave 2023.

programme.title: Rauschhaus | SPOT - Berlin Art Sessions #01 | Germany
programme.desc: DJ and Producer RAUSCHHAUS is playing a LiveSet at the Rooftop of an old Churchtower designed by Friedrich Schinkel back in 1824.

programme.title: Rauschhaus | SPOT - Berlin Art Sessions #01 | Germany
programme.desc: DJ and Producer RAUSCHHAUS is playing a LiveSet at the Rooftop of an old Churchtower designed by Friedrich Schinkel back in 1824.

programme.title: Rauschhaus | SPOT - Berlin Art Sessions #01 | Germany
programme.desc: DJ and Producer RAUSCHHAUS is playing a LiveSet at the Rooftop of an old Churchtower designed by Friedrich Schinkel back in 1824.

programme.title: Sandrien | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a sonic journey with Sandrien at 909 Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Pan-Pot | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Pan-Pot at the Staatsoper Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Stephan Jolk | Duomo di Milano Cathedral | Italy
programme.desc: A stunning melodic journey at sunset. Recorded from the piazza where stands the magnificent Duomo cathedral, a symbol of Milan.

programme.title: Scantraxx | 15 Years of Hardstyle | Netherlands
programme.desc: The film shows how the genre, the leading label â€˜Scantraxxâ€™ and itâ€™s artists experienced major topics that concerned the music industry as a whole, such as the impact of digitalization from vinyl to streaming and globalization to over 20 countries. In reliving these memories, DJâ€™s such as Headhunterz, Duro (known as Showtek), D-Block & S-te-Fan, Brennan Heart, Noisecontrollers, Wildstylez, Frontliner, Digital Punk, E-Force and many others are featured. Their stories are topped by the experiences of Scantraxxâ€™ founder DJ The Prophet, the genres favourite MCâ€™s, and professionals from industry leaders Q-dance and Scantraxx.

programme.title: Johnny Leal | Ahau Beach by Ephimera | Tulum (Mexico)
programme.desc: EphimeraÂ´s brain and director Johnny Leal playing at Ahau Tulum in front of the amazing Caribbean Sea. Enjoy our Nature, Respect.

programme.title: Steve Bug | ZooAtHome S8E3 | The Zoo Project | Ibiza
programme.desc: Steve Bug of Poker Flat recordings takes us on an underground safari at the Zoo Project Ibiza

programme.title: Tujamo | Parookaville 2020 | NRW (Germany)
programme.desc: Dive into an electrifying set from German electronic music powerhouse Tujamo, recorded live at Parookaville 2020 in North Rhine-Westphalia.

programme.title: Gabriel Ananda (live) | Ritter Butzke | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Gabriel Ananda plays a spectacular melodic tech live set for the Ritter Butzke series at Berlins Museum für Kommunikation.

programme.title: Paco Osuna | Music On Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Electronic heavyweight Paco Osuna, made heads spin during his set at Music On Festival. Check out his hard-hitting tech-house set recorded in one of Amsterdam's most renowned festivals.

programme.title: Hot Since 82 | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the hypnotic beats of Hot Since 82 at Music On Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Rogue Fire | Hybrid DJ Set at Naada 3.0 | Lisbon (Portugal)
programme.desc: Rogue Fire blends classical training with electronic mastery, creating a unique signature sound where saxophone meets synthesizer.

programme.title: Franky Rizardo | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic journey with Franky Rizardo at Music On Festival 2023 in the dynamic city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Thurman | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a sonic adventure with Thurman at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Lilly Palmer | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Dive into the enchanting beats of Lilly Palmer at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Moon Harbour head honcho Mathias Tanzmann delivers an epic tech house set as a part of Pacha On Air series.

programme.title: Mollono.Bass | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Monollo.Bass at the Friedrichstadt-Palast Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Richie Hawtin | Cocoon invites Minus at Amnesia | Ibiza
programme.desc: Richie Hawtin returns to Amnesia for another special edition of Cocoon invites Minus and once again proceeds to absolutely smash the main floor. This time using his new DJ setup and an arsenal of techno weapons of mass destruction.

programme.title: Richie Hawtin | Cocoon invites Minus at Amnesia | Ibiza
programme.desc: Richie Hawtin returns to Amnesia for another special edition of Cocoon invites Minus and once again proceeds to absolutely smash the main floor. This time using his new DJ setup and an arsenal of techno weapons of mass destruction.

programme.title: Richie Hawtin | Cocoon invites Minus at Amnesia | Ibiza
programme.desc: Richie Hawtin returns to Amnesia for another special edition of Cocoon invites Minus and once again proceeds to absolutely smash the main floor. This time using his new DJ setup and an arsenal of techno weapons of mass destruction.

programme.title: Mathias Kaden | SonneMondSterne | Saalburg (Germany)
programme.desc: SMS Boat party with Mathias Kaden

programme.title: Dimitri | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the infectious beats of Dimitri at 909 Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Mitch Oliver | Live in Montreal | Canada
programme.desc: Montrealâ€™s brightest star, Mitch Oliver signals the next era of his rocketing career with his latest video initiative.

programme.title: Steve Angello | Alfa Future People | Russia
programme.desc: At Alfa Future People Festival, Steve Angello showcased his signature sound of progressive house beats.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets - Fireworks Edition | Fort St. Angelo (Malta)
programme.desc: Prepare for a sound and light spectacle with Tenishia at â€˜Chasing Sunsets - Fireworks Editionâ€™ held at the iconic Fort St. Angelo in Malta.

programme.title: De Hofnar | Armada Invites | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: De Hofnar brings smooth, sun-soaked vibes to Armada Invites in Amsterdam, delivering a set filled with laid-back house grooves and melodic hooks. With a sound that blends deep emotion and easygoing rhythm, his performance turns the intimate Armada HQ into a feel-good escape, capturing the essence of chill

programme.title: Remy Unger | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a techno voyage with Remy Unger at 909 Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Joe T Vannelli | Villa Emo Vedelago | Treviso (Italy)
programme.desc: Joe T Vannelli live on tour with his great mix of house and melodic grooves at Villa Emo Vedelago in Treviso, Italy,

programme.title: Nastia | Mioritmic Festival | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Nastia, a DJ of Ukrainian descent with an amazing collection of records. From giving a presentation on her DJ-ing career at the school of her daughter, to playing large festival stages, Nastia is sure to win over your hearts, ears and eyes. Enjoy an hour long ecstatic exploration of sounds by one of the best female DJs out there.

programme.title: De Hofnar | Armada Invites | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: De Hofnar brings smooth, sun-soaked vibes to Armada Invites in Amsterdam, delivering a set filled with laid-back house grooves and melodic hooks. With a sound that blends deep emotion and easygoing rhythm, his performance turns the intimate Armada HQ into a feel-good escape, capturing the essence of chill

programme.title: Afrojack & Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike & Hardwell & Laidback Luke | No Place Like Home | Rotterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Some of the biggest names in electronic music - Afrojack, Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike, Hardwell, and Laidback Luke - came together for No Place Like Home in Rotterdam, delivering an unforgettable night of high-energy performances.

programme.title: DJ Tomer | Departed | Philadelphia (USA)
programme.desc: DJ Tomer brings his signature energetic beats to Departed in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Chambord (live) | Magical Island | Loire Valley
programme.desc: Chambord Live set at the Magical Island!

programme.title: Stephen Popov | Solar Island 2022 | Burgas (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Stephen Popov brings once again his A-game to our channel as a pre-Christmas gift.

programme.title: DJ T. | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our Next stream comes from DJ T. from Berlins Museum für Kommunikation. A highly skilled DJ and producer and an A&R with an uncanny ability to discover a nurture new talent, DJ T. is a master selector and one of the industryâ€™s most influential figures.

programme.title: Away To: Byblos with Rabih Rizk - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: Performing live at one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world, Rabih Rizk gets us all dancing.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 2 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Join the mesmerizing continuation of Apollonia's sonic journey at Music On Festival 2023 Part 2 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Away To: Desert Oasis with Nina Kraviz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: The legendary Nina Kraviz works her magic at a desert oasis for a wild ride in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: 3D (Dave Seaman, Danny Howells & Darren Emerson) | Arjaus | Argentina
programme.desc: A very special day for us receiving at home 3 legends of the electronic music scene.

programme.title: Marco Carola | Yalta Club | Sofia (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: In an intimate setting at the Yalta Club in Sofia, Marco Carola took control of the decks for one of his signature marathon sets. We were present and caught him at the peak hour of the night, so get ready for some Italian DJ supremacy!

programme.title: Rogue Fire | Hybrid DJ Set at Naada 3.0 | Lisbon (Portugal)
programme.desc: Rogue Fire blends classical training with electronic mastery, creating a unique signature sound where saxophone meets synthesizer.

programme.desc: Rogue Fire blends classical training with electronic mastery, creating a unique signature sound where saxophone meets synthesizer.
